payload.label: Example 1
payload.rightText: I used to wake up early as a child.

payload.label: Example 2
payload.bnText: এখন আমি সাধারণত একটু দেরিতে উঠি।
payload.rightText: Now I usually wake up a little later.

payload.label: Example 3
payload.rightText: She used to live in Dhaka.

payload.label: Example 4
payload.bnText: এখন সে সাধারণত অফিসের কাছে থাকে।
payload.rightText: Now she usually stays near the office.
